explicit_text: I'm Richard Gaines, and I've been the pastor of Consolidated Baptist Church in Lexington, Kentucky for the past twenty-seven years. I was originally from Texas and spent ten years in Corporate America before feeling called into ministry on Halloween night in 1990. Since then, I've dedicated my life to serving the church and community here, watching my family grow and even seeing my son become a pastor in Detroit.
